# Contributing

Thanks for your interest in contributing to Gaming Portal.

## Getting started

1. Fork the repo and create a branch from `main`
2. Set up local dev following the README
3. Make your changes, test them
4. Open a pull request

## Guidelines

- Keep PRs focused — one thing per PR
- Don't commit `.env` files or any secrets
- If you add a new env variable, update the relevant `.env.example`
- Prefer editing existing files over creating new ones

## Reporting bugs

Use the [bug report template](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md). Include logs where possible.

## Suggesting features

Use the [feature request template](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md).

## Code of conduct

Be respectful. This is a small personal project — keep feedback constructive.
